summary: Tested all 4 features: KYC Submit/Approval, VIP Payment Submit/Approval, Bill Payment Form styling, Gift Voucher Request. All backend APIs working (14/14 tests passed). Fixed critical bug: Gift Voucher frontend was calling wrong endpoint.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Frontend was calling /api/gift-voucher/redeem but backend endpoint is /api/gift-voucher/request

critical_code_review_comments: BillPayments.js: Line 241 has correct styling [&_input]:text-white for dark theme input visibility
VIPMembership.js: Lines 706-760 have Payment History section that shows when paymentHistory.length > 0
VIPMembership.js: Line 99 correctly fetches payment history from /api/user/vip-transactions/{uid}
GiftVoucherRedemption.js: Line 81 FIXED - changed from /api/gift-voucher/redeem to /api/gift-voucher/request

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Bill Payments form styling verified, Gift Voucher endpoint fixed)

seed_data_creation: Created VIP test user vipbilltest@test.com with 10000 PRC balance and submitted VIP payment for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features verified working. Bill Payments input fields now show white text on dark background (styling fix confirmed). VIP Payment History shows when user has payment records. Gift Voucher endpoint was fixed from /redeem to /request. Admin VIP Verification page at /admin/vip-verification shows pending payments with Review button.

kyc_submit_approval.details: KYC submission endpoint works. Admin can view KYC documents.

vip_payment_submit_approval.details: VIP payment flow complete. User can submit payment, admin can view and approve/reject at /admin/vip-verification

bill_payment_form_styling.ui_verified: Input fields show white text on dark background (bg-gray-800). Amount '500' clearly visible in screenshot.
